        f=self._fv.get(); [self.tree.delete(r) for r in self.tree.get_children()]
        for res in self._res:
            show=(f=="ALL" or
                  (f=="ZERO RATED" and res.get("zero_rated") is True) or
                  (f=="NOT ZERO" and res.get("zero_rated") is False and "mode" in res) or
                  f==res.get("rating",""))
            if show: self._row(res)

    def _sort(self,col):
        d=[(self.tree.set(r,col),r) for r in self.tree.get_children("")]
        d.sort()
        for i,(_,r) in enumerate(d): self.tree.move(r,"",i)

    def _ejson(self):
        if not self._res: messagebox.showinfo("","No results yet."); return
        p=filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".json",filetypes=[("JSON","*.json")],
            initialfile=f"sni_{datetime.now():%Y%m%d_%H%M%S}.json")
        if p:
            with open(p,"w") as f: json.dump(self._res,f,indent=2)
            messagebox.showinfo("Saved",p)

    def _etxt(self):
        if not self._res: messagebox.showinfo("","No results yet."); return
        p=filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".txt",filetypes=[("Text","*.txt")],
            initialfile=f"sni_{datetime.now():%Y%m%d_%H%M%S}.txt")
        if p:
            lines=[f"SNI Scan — {datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S}",f"Mode: {self._mode.get()}","="*90]
            for r in self._res:
                if r["mode"]=="zerorating":
                    lines.append(f"[{'ZERO RATED' if r['zero_rated'] else 'NOT ZERO  '}]  {r['sni']:<40}  {r.get('reason','')}")
                else:
                    tls=r.get("tls",{})
                    lines.append(f"[{r.get('rating','?'):<9}]  {r['sni']:<40}  HTTP:{fmt(r['http']):<5} WS-SSH:{fmt(r['ws80']):<5} CN:{tls.get('cert_cn','—')}")
            with open(p,"w") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
            messagebox.showinfo("Saved",p)

if __name__=="__main__":
    App().mainloop()
'''

path = os.path.expanduser("~/sni-scanner/sni_scanner.py")
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
with open(path, "w") as f:
    f.write(code)
os.chmod(path, 0o755)

desktop = f"""[Desktop Entry]
Version=1.0
Name=SNI Scanner v3
Comment=Test SNIs for zero-rating bypass
Exec=/usr/bin/python3 {path}
Icon=network-wireless
Terminal=false
Type=Application
Categories=Network;Utility;
StartupNotify=true
"""
app_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.local/share/applications")
desk_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/Desktop")
os.makedirs(app_dir, exist_ok=True)
for d in [app_dir, desk_dir]:
    dp = os.path.join(d, "sni-scanner.desktop")
    try:
        with open(dp,"w") as f: f.write(desktop)
        os.chmod(dp, 0o755)
    except: pass

print(f"✅ Written to {path}")
print("Launching...")
INSTALLER

# ---- Create the Liberator GUI Python script ----
cat > /usr/local/bin/liberator-gui.py << "ENDSCRIPT"
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys, os, subprocess, re, tempfile
from PyQt5.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QMainWindow, QWidget, QPushButton, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QLabel, QListWidget, QComboBox, QTextEdit, QMessageBox, QFileDialog)
from PyQt5.QtCore import Qt, QThread, pyqtSignal
import usb.core

class DeviceDetector:
    def __init__(self):
        self.detected_info = {"brand":"","model":"","cpu":"","method":""}
    def detect(self):
        found = []
        try:
            out = subprocess.check_output("adb devices -l", shell=True).decode()
            if "device" in out:
                model = subprocess.check_output("adb shell getprop ro.product.model", shell=True).decode().strip()
                cpu = subprocess.check_output("adb shell getprop ro.board.platform", shell=True).decode().strip()
                self.detected_info.update({"brand":"Android","model":model,"cpu":cpu,"method":"adb"})
                found.append(f"ADB: {model} ({cpu})")
        except: pass
        try:
            out = subprocess.check_output("fastboot devices", shell=True).decode()
            if out.strip():
                self.detected_info.update({"brand":"Android","model":"Fastboot Mode","cpu":"unknown","method":"fastboot"})
                found.append("Fastboot device")
        except: pass
        try:
            out = subprocess.check_output("ideviceinfo -k DeviceName", shell=True).decode().strip()
            self.detected_info.update({"brand":"Apple","model":out,"cpu":"Dependent","method":"checkra1n"})
            found.append(f"iPhone: {out}")
        except: pass
        try:
            dev = usb.core.find(find_all=True)
            for d in dev:
                if d.idVendor == 0x0e8d:
                    self.detected_info.update({"brand":"MediaTek","model":"Generic","cpu":"MTK","method":"mtk"})
                    found.append("MediaTek device (Mkopa)")
                    break
        except: pass
        return found or ["No device"]
    
class Worker(QThread):
    log = pyqtSignal(str)
    fin = pyqtSignal(bool)
    def __init__(self, cmd, name):
        super().__init__()
        self.cmd = cmd
        self.name = name
    def run(self):
        self.log.emit(f"Running: {self.name}")
        proc = subprocess.Popen(self.cmd, shell=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True)
        for line in proc.stdout:
            self.log.emit(line.strip())
        proc.wait()
        self.fin.emit(proc.returncode == 0)

class MainWin(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle("PHONE LIBERATOR - L0V3PL1NY")
        self.resize(900,650)
        self.setStyleSheet("background:#1a1a1a; color:#0f0; font-family:monospace;")
        self.detector = DeviceDetector()
        self.cmd = ""
        cw = QWidget()
        self.setCentralWidget(cw)
        lay = QVBoxLayout()
        lab = QLabel("UNIVERSAL PHONE UNLOCKER - DESKTOP GUI")
        lab.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
        lay.addWidget(lab)
        det_btn = QPushButton("AUTO-DETECT DEVICE")
        det_btn.clicked.connect(self.detect)
        lay.addWidget(det_btn)
        self.dev_label = QLabel("No device")
        lay.addWidget(self.dev_label)
        self.info_box = QTextEdit()
        self.info_box.setMaximumHeight(80)
        lay.addWidget(self.info_box)
        self.op_combo = QComboBox()
        self.op_combo.addItems(["Screen Lock Remove", "FRP Bypass", "iCloud Bypass", "Mkopa Unlock", "Factory Reset", "Flash Stock (select .zip)", "NUKE ALL"])
        lay.addWidget(QLabel("Select operation:"))
        lay.addWidget(self.op_combo)
        self.exec_btn = QPushButton("EXECUTE")
        self.exec_btn.clicked.connect(self.execute)
        lay.addWidget(self.exec_btn)
        self.log = QTextEdit()
        self.log.setReadOnly(True)
        lay.addWidget(self.log)
    def detect(self):
        self.log.append("[*] Scanning...")
        lst = self.detector.detect()
        self.dev_label.setText(" / ".join(lst))
        self.info_box.setText(str(self.detector.detected_info))
    def execute(self):
        op = self.op_combo.currentText()
        meth = self.detector.detected_info.get("method","")
        if op == "Screen Lock Remove":
            if meth=="adb": self.cmd = "adb shell su -c 'rm -rf /data/system/locksettings.db* /data/system/gesture.key /data/system/password.key; reboot'"
            elif meth=="fastboot": self.cmd = "fastboot erase userdata && fastboot reboot"
            elif meth=="checkra1n": self.cmd = "checkra1n -c && sleep 5 && ssh root@localhost -p2222 'rm /private/var/Keychains/keychain-2.db && reboot'"
            elif meth=="mtk": self.cmd = "python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk payload --metamode FASTBOOT && fastboot erase userdata && fastboot reboot"
        elif op == "FRP Bypass":
            if meth=="adb": self.cmd = "adb shell content insert --uri content://settings/secure --bind name:s:user_setup_complete --bind value:s:1; adb shell am start -n com.google.android.gsf.login/"
            elif meth=="fastboot": self.cmd = "fastboot oem unlock-go; fastboot erase frp; fastboot reboot"
            else: self.cmd = "python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk payload --metamode FASTBOOT && fastboot erase frp && fastboot reboot"
        elif op == "iCloud Bypass":
            self.cmd = "checkra1n -c -k <(echo 'setenv boot-args -v cs_enforcement_disable=1'; echo 'bootx') && sleep 10 && ssh root@localhost -p2222 'mount -o rw,union,update /; rm -rf /Applications/Setup.app; uicache -a; killall backboardd'"
        elif op == "Mkopa Unlock":
            self.cmd = "python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk payload --metamode FASTBOOT && fastboot oem unlock && fastboot erase userdata && fastboot erase frp && fastboot reboot"
        elif op == "Factory Reset":
            self.cmd = "fastboot -w" if meth in ("fastboot","adb") else "adb shell recovery --wipe_data"
        elif op == "Flash Stock (select .zip)":
            file, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(self, "Select firmware", "", "Firmware (*.zip *.ipsw)")
            if file:
                self.cmd = f"unzip -o {file} -d /tmp/fw && cd /tmp/fw && for img in boot system vendor; do fastboot flash $img $img.img; done && fastboot reboot"
        elif op == "NUKE ALL":
            self.cmd = "fastboot erase system && fastboot erase vendor && fastboot erase userdata && fastboot erase boot && fastboot reboot-bootloader" if meth=="fastboot" else "adb shell su -c 'dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/block/mmcblk0 bs=512 count=1; reboot'"
        else:
            self.log.append("Unknown op")
            return
        self.log.append(f"Executing: {self.cmd}")
        self.worker = Worker(self.cmd, op)
        self.worker.log.connect(self.log.append)
        self.worker.fin.connect(self.done)
        self.worker.start()
    def done(self, ok):
        self.log.append("Success!" if ok else "Failed.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = QApplication(sys.argv)
    win = MainWin()
    win.show()
    sys.exit(app.exec_())
ENDSCRIPT

Look for 'Phone Liberator' in your app menu."'

# 1. Fix package manager, install all essentials
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y adb fastboot libimobiledevice-utils python3-pip python3-pyqt5 git curl wget android-tools-adb android-tools-fastboot usbutils unzip xterm

# 2. Force Python packages (your machine, your rules)

# 3. Add udev rule so all phone USB modes are accessible
cat > /etc/udev/rules.d/51-android.rules << 'UDEV_END'
SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{idVendor}=="0e8d", MODE="0666"
SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{idVendor}=="18d1", MODE="0666"
SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{idVendor}=="05ac", MODE="0666"
SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{idVendor}=="0bb4", MODE="0666"
SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{idVendor}=="2e04", MODE="0666"
UDEV_END
udevadm control --reload-rules
udevadm trigger

# 4. Write the GUI script from base64 (exact same logic, no quoting issues)

import base64
script = base64.b64decode(
    ''
)
open('/usr/local/bin/liberator-gui.py', 'wb').write(script)

    # fallback: 1×1 pixel PNG base64
    echo "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==" | base64 -d > /usr/share/icons/liberator.png
}

# 6. Desktop entry (no inner quotes trap)
cat > /usr/share/applications/liberator.desktop << 'DESK_END'
[Desktop Entry]
Name=Phone Liberator
Comment=Universal Unlock Tool
Exec=/usr/local/bin/liberator-gui
Icon=/usr/share/icons/liberator.png
Terminal=false
Type=Application
Categories=Utility;
DESK_END

# 7. Clone mtkclient if missing
if [ ! -d /opt/mtkclient ]; then

    pip3 install --break-system-packages -r /opt/mtkclient/requirements.txt
fi

echo "✔ GUI installed with all drivers. Launch from your app menu."
HEREDOC_END

import base64, os

# Ghost mode patch function (appended to the existing code)
ghost_code = '''
    def ghost_mode(self):
        # Step 1: download stock firmware if not present
        model = self.detector.detected_info.get('model','')
        self.log.append(f'[*] Ghost Mode initiated for {model}')
        # For Mkopa, typical models: 'Mkopa 4G', 'Mkopa Neo', etc.
        # We'll assume user has downloaded the correct stock ROM to /tmp/stock
        if not os.path.exists('/tmp/stock'):
            self.log.append('[!] Place the stock firmware in /tmp/stock (scatter folder) then re-run.')
            return
        # Step 2: patch boot.img with Magisk if not yet patched
        boot_img = '/tmp/stock/boot.img'
        if not os.path.exists(boot_img + '.magisk'):
            self.log.append('[*] Patching boot.img with Magisk...')
            os.system('cd /tmp && wget https://github.com/topjohnwu/Magisk/releases/download/v26.4/Magisk-v26.4.apk && unzip -o Magisk-v26.4.apk -d /tmp/magisk_apk && /tmp/magisk_apk/lib/arm64-v8a/libmagiskboot.so unpack /tmp/stock/boot.img && /tmp/magisk_apk/lib/arm64-v8a/libmagiskboot.so repack /tmp/stock/boot.img && mv new-boot.img /tmp/stock/boot.img.magisk')
            boot_img += '.magisk'
        # Step 3: flash the full firmware with mtkclient
        self.log.append('[*] Flashing full firmware (pre-rooted)...')
        os.system(f'python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk flash -w /tmp/stock')
        # Step 4: write new IMEI(s) via AT command engine
        self.log.append('[*] Injecting new IMEI...')
        # Use mtkclient to send AT+EGMR=1,7,\"IMEI_NEW\" to modem
        new_imei1 = '354619090123456'  # Generate random? We'll let user input later
        new_imei2 = '354619090123457'
        os.system(f'python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk stage payload && python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk at \"AT+EGMR=1,7,\\\"{new_imei1}\\\"\"')
        os.system(f'python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk at \"AT+EGMR=1,10,\\\"{new_imei2}\\\"\"')
        self.log.append('[+] Ghost Mode complete. Device is now root, IMEI changed, Mkopa-free.')
'''

# Read current script
with open('/usr/local/bin/liberator-gui.py', 'r') as f:
    code = f.read()

# Find the class MainWin and insert ghost_mode method before the last method
insert_pos = code.rfind('if __name__')
if insert_pos != -1:
    new_code = code[:insert_pos] + ghost_code + code[insert_pos:]
else:
    # Fallback: append at the end of class
    class_end = code.rfind('    def done')
    if class_end != -1:
        end_of_method = code.find('sys.exit(app.exec_())')
        new_code = code[:end_of_method] + ghost_code + code[end_of_method:]
    else:
        new_code = code

# Add Ghost Mode button to the combo options and execution logic
# We'll inject additional condition in the execute method
find_exec = new_code.find('elif op == "NUKE ALL":')
if find_exec != -1:
    ghost_option = '\n        elif op == "GHOST MODE (Root + IMEI + Clean Flash)": self.ghost_mode()\n'
# Also add the option to the combo items
find_combo_init = new_code.find('self.op_combo.addItems([')
if find_combo_init != -1:;     item_list_start = new_code.find('[', find_combo_init)
with open('/usr/local/bin/liberator-gui.py', 'w') as f:
print('Ghost Mode integrated. Restart GUI.')
"

        os.system(f'python3 /opt/mtkclient/mtk at \"AT+EGMR=1,10,\\\"{new_imei2}\\\"\"')

else:
